source_pr.title: executor, util: add Benchmarks for HashAggExec and StreamAggExec
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
Add benchmarks for aggregation executors. ( #8997 )
These benchmarks help developers to catch the performance of aggregation executors on different parameters and to tune their cost model better.

### What is changed and how it works?
1. Introduce a new `mockDataSource` executor to mock data.
2. Add benchmarks for stream and hash aggregation executors.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change

Side effects

Related changes
